projects.title: LinkDrop
projects.description: LinkDrop is a fast and user-friendly online video downloader that enables users to download videos and audio from popular platforms such as YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, Reddit, and more. With no registration required, it provides a simple interface where users can paste a video link and quickly download content in various formats and quality options, including Full HD and MP3.

projects.title: DropShare
projects.description: DropFile is a modern and responsive file-sharing web application that allows users to upload files up to 100MB and instantly generate a shareable download link. It features a clean dark-themed interface with drag-and-drop upload, file browsing, and customizable link expiration options, all without requiring users to log in.

projects.title: DEVCARD — GitHub Profile Dashboard
projects.description: A fully functional developer dashboard built with pure HTML, CSS, and JavaScript that consumes the GitHub Public API in real-time. Search any GitHub username and instantly view their profile stats, top repositories sorted by stars, language breakdown with animated progress bars, recent public activity feed, and a contribution heatmap — all rendered dynamically with zero page reloads. Features a clean, minimal UI with smooth animations, responsive layout, and smart error handling for rate limits and invalid users
tech: HTML · CSS · JavaScript · GitHub REST API · Fetch API · Live Server

projects.title: TechShop – Admin Dashboard (E-Commerce Management System)
projects.description:
TechShop is a web-based e-commerce platform designed for selling computer components and technology products online. The system allows customers to browse products, manage their shopping cart, and place orders through a responsive and user-friendly interface.

This system was developed as a school project for the Information Management course, demonstrating the implementation of a full-stack web application using PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
